faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Can't find an answer? Contact us via LINE or Email
faq.q1: What are the machine dimensions and resolution?
faq.a1: Two-Fold Display: physical dimensions 664×2080×440mm (W×H×D), recommended content resolution 344×1032px. Triple-Fold Double-Side Display: physical dimensions 1280×2065.8×488.8mm (W×H×D), recommended 688×1032px. Playback equipment is provided — clients only need to prepare content files.
faq.a2: We support MP4 video and JPG/PNG images. Please confirm your content resolution matches the specs before booking.
faq.q3: Can multiple units be placed side by side?
faq.a3: Yes. 5 Single units side by side equals approximately 1720×1032px (close to 16:9 ratio), ideal for large display walls. For large quantities, we recommend booking early to ensure availability.
faq.q4: Is there a limit on rental duration?
faq.a4: Standard rental is up to 4 days (excluding setup and teardown days). Long-term rentals over 4 days require a custom quote — please contact us directly.
faq.q5: Is on-site setup assistance available? How is it priced?
faq.a5: Setup assistance is available as an add-on: NT$3,000/person for half day, NT$4,500/person for full day. 1–5 units: 1 technician; 6–10 units: 2 technicians. Without assistance, basic operating instructions are provided.
faq.q6: Is there an extra charge for late teardown?
faq.a6: Teardown between 17:00–22:00 incurs an additional night service fee of NT$2,000 per unit. Select the appropriate teardown window when booking — the fee will be included automatically.
faq.q7: How do I pay after booking? Can I pay by credit card?
faq.a7: After submitting the booking form, a confirmation email with fee details and bank transfer information will be sent. Please complete the bank transfer within 48 hours to confirm your slot. We do not currently accept credit card or cash payments.
faq.q8: What if I need to cancel or change dates?
faq.a8: Please notify us as early as possible via LINE or Email. Cancellations before payment are free of charge. Cancellation fees apply after payment depending on how close the event date is. Please contact us for details.
faq.q9: What happens if equipment is damaged during the rental?
faq.a9: Please handle the equipment with care throughout the rental period. We inspect and document the equipment condition together before delivery. Damage caused by improper use will be the renter's responsibility. For hardware malfunctions not caused by the renter, please contact us immediately via LINE or phone and we will assist in assessing and resolving the situation.

booking.delivery_address_hint: Enter the delivery location so we can determine if remote-area surcharges apply
booking.floor_policy_body: Delivery is included to the 1st floor (free). If the machine needs to be moved to a higher floor without an elevator, a surcharge of NT$2,000 per floor applies (NT$1,000/person × min. 2 people). Example: 3rd floor, no elevator = NT$4,000. The actual charge will be itemized in your confirmation letter.
booking.floor_policy_dim: Machine case dimensions — Two-fold: 84 × 102.5 × 130.5 cm (W×D×H); Triple-fold: TBD, please contact us to confirm

guide.step1_desc: Click to select the content you want to preview. The diagram and folded preview will update instantly.
guide.single_desc: When folded forward, the two-fold machine creates two display faces, each 344 × 516 px. Design a single 344 × 1032 px canvas with two 344 × 516 videos arranged head-to-head — both faces will display correctly after folding.
guide.single_tips_a: Canvas size: 344 × 1032 px (contains two videos top and bottom)
guide.single_tips_b: Top half (Face 1): 344 × 516 px, normal orientation; Bottom half (Face 2): 344 × 516 px, rotated 180°
guide.single_tips_note: 💡 Head-to-head layout: both videos have their tops pointing toward the center fold line. After folding, each half faces a different audience — both display in the correct orientation.
guide.triple_desc: The triple dual-sided machine unfolds into three panels. When folded, it stands freely and displays content in two directions simultaneously.
guide.triple_footer: Panels 1+3 (172 × 1032 each) combine into full back face (344 × 1032) when folded · Panel 2 (344 × 1032) is the front face
guide.triple_tips_a: Back Content A: 344 × 1032 px, portrait (A-Right 172 × 1032 + A-Left 172 × 1032)
guide.triple_tips_b: Front Content B: 344 × 1032 px, portrait, normal orientation
guide.triple_tips_note: 💡 The triple machine attracts audiences from both sides. Consider different messaging on each face for maximum visual impact.
